summary: Focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform, developing HID firmware and input drivers, and conducting AI research for trading and computer vision. Also maintained several Telegram bots, a file-tagging utility, and an on-device LLM assistant.

items.title: Windows input filter driver development
items.description: Built and refined a KMDF input filter driver for capturing and injecting keyboard and mouse events, including integration tests and library features.

items.title: NZT mobile app updates
items.description: Added a new product flavor and extended system information reporting in the NZT mobile assistant.

items.title: Crypto trading platform development
items.description: Completed a .NET rewrite of the SaaS crypto algo trading platform, adding strategy templates, proxy infrastructure, billing, and security hardening.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware iteration
items.description: Developed new firmware variants and fixed connectivity issues for the feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: File tagging utility polish
items.description: Enhanced the Windows Explorer file-tagging tool with PDF support, CLI improvements, and automated Store publishing pipelines.

items.title: CV aim assist tool development
items.description: Improved a computer vision-based aim assist utility with YOLO confidence filtering, debug overlay, and input fallback mechanisms.

items.title: HID firmware hardware revisions
items.description: Introduced v12 (dual-core) and v13 (USB) versions of the ESP32-S3 mouse/keyboard emulation firmware.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Ran extensive experiments on deep learning models for crypto price prediction, achieving improvements with sparse MoE and snapshot ensembles.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant development
items.description: Developed an Android LLM assistant with local model inference, tool use, and multi-agent delegation for phone control.

items.title: Aim assist tool enhancements
items.description: Rewrote the overlay rendering to DirectX 11, added linger mode, autofire, and YOLO model integration for the CV aim assist utility.

items.title: File tagging utility release engineering
items.description: Automated CI/CD and Microsoft Store publishing for the Windows file-tagging tool, and added a CLI property reader.

items.title: n8n Telegram node maintenance
items.description: Fixed authentication issues and added an album trigger to the n8n TelePilot node for Telegram automation.

items.title: Code intelligence engine development
items.description: Added LSP integration, automatic index sync, and expanded language support for the graph-based code analysis tool.

items.title: Neovim configuration maintenance
items.description: Updated the Neovim IDE setup with LSP config migration, treesitter fixes, and secret detection pre-commit hook.

items.title: HID firmware fix
items.description: Addressed a COM restart issue in the ESP32-S3 mouse/keyboard emulation firmware.

items.title: Poker CV system development
items.description: Built a computer vision pipeline to detect poker hands, cards, and actions from screen recordings, achieving high accuracy.

items.title: Aim assist tool updates
items.description: Continued development of the CV-based aim assist utility with general improvements.

items.title: n8n Telegram node fixes
items.description: Fixed TDLib session storage and restored required API parameters for the TelePilot n8n node.

items.title: HID firmware v11 development
items.description: Built version 11 of the ESP32-S3 firmware, adding new device support, BLE safety, performance profiles, and self-reporting.

items.title: Autonomous coding tool enhancements
items.description: Added squash merging, worktree completion tracking, and git rules configuration to the auto-claude multi-session AI coding system.

items.title: Aim assist modes and input
items.description: Introduced operational modes and USB HID mouse rate limiting for the CV aim assist tool.

items.title: NZT app 64-bit support
items.description: Enabled arm64-v8a architecture support in the NZT mobile assistant.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Iterated on multiple trading strategies with hyperopt optimization and backtesting for the Freqtrade bot.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram dashboard
items.description: Created a web application with Docker support to monitor multiple Freqtrade bots via Telegram, with profit tracking and authentication.

items.title: Freqtrade monitor app
items.description: Built a mobile app with glassy UI cards, profit charts, and bot management for Freqtrade.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot development
items.description: Started a new Telegram bot project with API integration and structured logging.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy optimization
items.description: Performed hyperparameter optimization and backtesting of trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot.

items.title: Crypto signal bot development
items.description: Developed a Telegram bot that uses AI to generate crypto trading signals based on technical indicators and divergences.

items.title: File tagging utility early development
items.description: Developed the initial CLI and UI for the Windows file-tagging tool.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot maintenance
items.description: Updated the .NET ChatGPT Telegram bot with long message support and performance improvements.
